finding_results.notes: Within chapter 4, every Room 110 reference already uses the same downstream-canonical identity, 'Mrs. Delacroix,' so no prose change was required in this file. The remaining mismatch described by the packet is upstream in earlier chapters and cannot be fully resolved inside this isolated chapter-only pass.
